private_opportunities.title: McDonald's Plans to Open 8,000 Restaurants by End of 2027 and ...
private_opportunities.snippet:
# McDonald’s Plans to Open 8,000 Restaurants by End of 2027 and Shake Up Menu

Published

Jan 20, 2026 at 11:12 AM EST

updated

Jan 21, 2026 at 09:37 AM EST

Amanda Greenwood

Associate News Editor

McDonalds is planning to complete its global expansion of more than 8,000 new restaurants across 50,000 locations by 2027, and this year, also plans to change its pricing structure and menu offerings.

## What Changes Is McDonald’s Planning?

### Global Expansion

McDonald’s plans to reach 50,000 locations worldwide by the end of 2027, including the opening of more than 8,000 new restaurants (about 900 in the U.S.), an initiative that began in 2024. The expansion is designed to position the company for value‑focused consumers and to intensify competition in high‑growth international markets. [...] Correction 1/21/26, 9:36 a.m. ET: This article was corrected to state that McDonald's plans to complete its global expansion by the end of 2027 and to clarify its new pricing guidelines.

Google Preferred Source Banner

## Related Podcasts

## Top Stories

Democrats’ Pipe Dream of Turning Texas Blue Takes Step Forward
The 5 Ways Khamenei’s Iran Survival Plan Haunts Trump
The Fight for the Post-Trump Republican Party Starts in Texas
Nicole M. Amor’s Husband Recalls Final Call With Killed US Soldier
US Launches Military Action In Ecuador: What To Know
How Food Is Replacing Pills as Medicine at the Top US Hospitals

## Trending [...] ### New Menu Changes

Some popular CosMc's offerings are being introduced to the menu after the experimental, drinks-forward shops shuttered in June 2025. According to McDonald’s, the Toasted Vanilla Frappé, Strawberry Watermelon Refresher, Sprite Lunar Splash, Popping Tropic Refresher, and a Creaming Vanilla Cold Brew will now be available at 500 McDonald's locations.

New sandwich options and chicken items are likely to be part of future menu updates, as customer demand for chicken products now matches that for beef items, Mashed reported.

The restaurant said its “Better Burger Initiative,” which focuses on improving burger preparation, using fresher ingredients, and implementing stricter food-handling standards, will also revolutionize the quality of its burgers.

private_opportunities.title: McDonald's CEO confirms 8,000 new stores opening in major ...
private_opportunities.snippet:
More from The Sun

# McDonald’s CEO confirms 8,000 new stores opening in major expansion push

Plus, read up on how the chain grew into the global fast food superpower as we know it today

McDonald’s CEO confirms 8,000 new stores opening in major expansion push

THE top boss of McDonald’s has announced that the fast food giant has some major expansion plans in the works, on a mission to grow its global presence.

The chain’s CEO, Chris Kempczinski, shared McDonald’s plan to roll out over 8,000 new restaurants by the end of 2027.

### Sign up for the Money newsletter

### Thank you!

Please provide a valid email.

Your info will be used in accordance with our Privacy Policy

You'll now receive top stories, breaking news, and more, straight to your email.

NINTCHDBPICT001036321476 [...] The goal to have 50,000 McDonald’s locations by 2027’s end marks the fastest period of growth in the chain’s history.

“As I’ve said before, there has never been a better time to be part of McDonald’s,” Kempczinski said when the chain first announced the expansion plans in 2023.

“We have a clear trajectory for future growth as we continue to build on the brand strength, global footprint, and digital ecosystem that have resulted in unparalleled competitive advantages and cemented McDonald’s as one of the world’s leading consumer-facing brands.”

## TASTY SUCCESS

McDonald’s has seen great success since it was founded over eight decades ago.

The first location opened back in 1940, but it was not McDonald’s as we know it now. [...] NINTCHDBPICT001036321476

McDonald’s is on a mission to expand globally as it races to regain its title of largest fast food chain in the worldCredit: Alamy

BIZ-MCDONALDS-CEO-CHICAGO-TB

McDonald’s, one of the most iconic fast food chains, has lost its crown as the largest quick service restaurant in the world to the Chinese company Mixue Bingcheng as of late 2024.

Despite being dethroned, the Golden Arches still operates a huge global network of over 41,800 spots across more than 100 countries, holding steady as a dominant force in the industry, known for its burgers, crispy fries, and global recognition. 

At the chain’s third quarter 2025 earnings conference call on Wednesday morning, top boss Kempczinski shared that McDonald’s has even more global reach in its sights.

executive_takeaway: The most significant opportunity this week is the expansion of McDonald's, with plans to open 8,000 new restaurants by 2027. This presents a high-impact opportunity for PARTTEAM & OEMKIOSKS to supply self-order kiosks and digital signage solutions, aligning with the company's strategic objective of QSR and Food Service Market Growth. Leadership should prioritize immediate engagement with McDonald's procurement team to explore collaboration opportunities, leveraging the NOMYU QSR self-order kiosks and digital signage solutions to enhance McDonald's customer experience and operational efficiency.
final_brief:
Business Opportunities Snapshot — QSR and Food Service (Last 7 Days)

── LIVE EU TENDERS ──────────────────────────────────
• Romania – Ticket-issuing machines — ROU | Deadline: Not specified | Value: Not specified | Urgency: Monitor
  Fit: The tender for ticket-issuing machines in Romania aligns well with PARTTEAM & OEMKIOSKS' capabilities in transactional and payment kiosks, specifically the TRANSACT TVM product line. This opportunity fits within the company's expertise in providing ticket vending solutions for transport systems, although it does not directly align with the QSR and Food Service Market Growth objective.
  Action: Proceed with a bid to leverage the TRANSACT TVM product line and explore potential software and service upsell opportunities.
  Link: https://ted.europa.eu/en/notice/-/detail/134219-2026

• Netherlands – Software-related services — NLD | Deadline: 2026-04-13 | Value: Not specified | Urgency: Monitor
  Fit: This tender is focused on software-related services for online courses in digital skills, which does not align with PARTTEAM & OEMKIOSKS' core offerings in hardware kiosks and digital signage. The tender does not fit our product lines or strategic objectives in the QSR and food service market or software and recurring revenue growth.
  Action: No-bid; focus resources on opportunities aligned with QSR market growth and software revenue expansion.
  Link: https://ted.europa.eu/en/notice/-/detail/134229-2026

• Spain – Surveillance and security systems — ESP | Deadline: 2026-03-30 | Value: Not specified | Urgency: Monitor
  Fit: This tender is for surveillance and security systems, specifically CCTV cameras, which does not align with PARTTEAM & OEMKIOSKS' core product offerings focused on kiosks and digital signage. There is no direct product fit as the company does not specialize in security systems or infrastructure for CCTV installations.
  Action: No-bid; focus resources on opportunities aligned with strategic objectives.
  Link: https://ted.europa.eu/en/notice/-/detail/134251-2026

── PRIVATE OPPORTUNITIES ────────────────────────────
• McDonald's Plans to Open 8,000 Restaurants by End of 2027 | Newsweek | Published: Not specified
  Fit: McDonald's is planning to open 8,000 new restaurants by 2027, which presents a significant opportunity for PARTTEAM & OEMKIOSKS to supply QSR self-order kiosks and digital signage solutions. PARTTEAM could offer their NOMYU QSR self-order kiosks and digital billboards to enhance McDonald's customer experience and operational efficiency.
  Action: Contact McDonald's procurement team to discuss potential collaboration on self-order kiosks and digital signage solutions.
  Link: https://www.newsweek.com/mcdonalds-plans-open-8000-restaurants-new-menu-11387077

• McDonald's CEO confirms 8,000 new stores opening in major expansion | The Sun | Published: Not specified
  Fit: McDonald's is planning to open 8,000 new stores as part of a major expansion. PARTTEAM & OEMKIOSKS could provide self-ordering kiosks and digital signage solutions to support McDonald's in enhancing customer experience and operational efficiency in these new locations.
  Action: Contact McDonald's procurement to discuss potential collaboration on self-service kiosks and digital signage solutions.
  Link: https://www.the-sun.com/money/15445440/mcdonalds-ceo-confirms-new-stores-opening-expansion/

• Big news, folks! Your brand new McDonald's location is opening | Facebook | Published: Not specified
  Fit: McDonald's is opening a new location, which presents an opportunity for PARTTEAM & OEMKIOSKS to supply self-ordering kiosks. PARTTEAM could offer their NOMYU QSR self-order kiosks and YSnack software to enhance customer experience and streamline operations.
  Action: Contact McDonald's procurement to discuss self-ordering kiosk solutions.
  Link: https://www.facebook.com/61560495011065/posts/big-news-folks-your-brand-new-mcdonalds-location-is-opening-its-doors-and-trust-/122191598450349833/

── PRE-TENDER SIGNALS ───────────────────────────────
No pre-tender public signals in this sector this period.

── EXECUTIVE TAKEAWAY ───────────────────────────────
The most significant opportunity this week is the expansion of McDonald's, with plans to open 8,000 new restaurants by 2027. This presents a high-impact opportunity for PARTTEAM & OEMKIOSKS to supply self-order kiosks and digital signage solutions, aligning with the company's strategic objective of QSR and Food Service Market Growth. Leadership should prioritize immediate engagement with McDonald's procurement team to explore collaboration opportunities, leveraging the NOMYU QSR self-order kiosks and digital signage solutions to enhance McDonald's customer experience and operational efficiency.
